case_title: RICHARD FRAINIER VS. BOSA DEVELOPMENT CALIFORNIA, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-29-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BOSA DEVELOPMENT CALIFORNIA, INC.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 3/7/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-UNDELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2017 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRAINIER, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT BOSA DEVELOPMENT CALIFORNIA, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRAINIER, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOSA DEVELOPMENT CALIFORNIA, INC. $3,751.56 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,816.56 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,751.56 FILED BY FRAINIER, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT BOSA DEVELOPMENT CALIFORNIA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF RICHARD FRAINER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BOSA DEVELOPMENT CALIFORNIA, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
